query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_proyectos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as proyectos_manual,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'system' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as proyectos_system,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as proyectos_null
FROM projects;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_proyectos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as proyectos_manual,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'system' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as proyectos_system,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as proyectos_null
FROM projects;
